ingredients.name: 1  small head iceberg lettuce or other lettuce or leafy greens (, chopped into big bite size pieces (5 to 6 big handfuls))
cherry or grape tomatoes, halved ((~125g/4oz), or 2 tomatoes cut into wedges or chunks)
1  cucumber (, sliced (medium Lebanese / Persian cucumber, or 1/2 long Telegraph/English cucumber))
1  carrot (, peeled and grated using a box grater)
parsley or chives (, very finely chopped (if you're feeling fancy!))
cider vinegar ((or any vinegar or lemon juice) (Note 1))
extra virgin olive oil ((or other neutral oil))
Dijon Mustard ((or other non spicy smooth mustard))

steps.instruction: Dressing: Shake Dressing in a jar. Taste and adjust - more oil for creamier/less tang, vinegar for more tang, sugar if you want touch of sweet.
Toss: Place all Salad ingredients in a big bowl. Pour over Dressing. Toss well.
Serve: Transfer to serving bowl and serve immediately!
